name: acc-deepbook-course
description: DeepBook content for the Agentic Community College (ACC) framework. Bundles a set of hands-on lessons that walk learners through building Sui DeepBook integrations end-to-end.

probes.message_fail: Node.js 18+ is required. Install from https://nodejs.org or via fnm/nvm.
pnpm is required. Install via `npm install -g pnpm` or follow https://pnpm.io/installation.
Docker is not running. Start Docker Desktop and re-run.
Sui CLI not found. Install: https://docs.sui.io/build/install — the deepbook-sandbox bring-up scripts need it.

Enable sui-pilot for Move/Sui doc grounding: `claude plugins enable sui-pilot@contract-hero` (the contract-hero marketplace is the canonical home; if you've installed sui-pilot from a different marketplace, edit lesson.json's prerequisites to reference your tag).
Clone https://github.com/MystenLabs/deepbook-sandbox to ~/workspace/deepbook-sandbox/ — the path is load-bearing (the lesson reference apps' vite.config.ts reads from it directly).

probes.message_pass: Sandbox faucet manifest is reachable on http://localhost:9009/manifest.
probes.message_fail: Sandbox faucet manifest is not reachable on http://localhost:9009/manifest. Start Docker, then run `pnpm deploy-all` from ~/workspace/deepbook-sandbox/sandbox.

probes.message_pass: toolkit@contract-hero is enabled (publish-html, html-artifact, for-dummies, move-call-chains available).
probes.message_fail: toolkit@contract-hero is not enabled. The conductor's post-lesson publish-html offer and in-section scratch-explainer suggestions need it. Install it from the contract-hero marketplace (Claude Code → Plugins → contract-hero → toolkit), then re-run.
